notes: An owner observation on the live TSLA panel: the Pricing Models page headlined "composite fair value \$76.62 (equal weight), +308% vs price" directly above its own 0% agreement score, while the Model of Models page showed a precision-weighted \$267. An equal-weight average of sixteen different constructions spanning \$4 to \$354 is not a fair value — it is the BENCHMARK, the row every weighting method must beat (exactly its role in the experiment plan). - The Pricing Models headline is now the precision-weighted value — the same number, from the same computation, as the Model of Models view (t
